vulnerability.title: Install fapolicyd Package
vulnerability.description: The fapolicyd package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install fapolicyd
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # Remediation is applicable only in certain platforms if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then if ! rpm -q --quiet "fapolicyd" ; then dnf install -y "fapolicyd" fi else >&2 echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done' fi

triage_decision.reason: The fapolicyd package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install fapolicyd
